about.title: About Us
about.description: Caranalizer — your reliable partner for Korean cars and genuine parts
about.hero: Parts Straight from Korea — No Middlemen
about.heroSub: We are based in Asan, South Korea — 30 minutes from the Hyundai Mobis factory. We source parts directly and ship them to you worldwide.
about.why1Desc: We are in Asan — next to the main Hyundai Mobis factory. We source parts directly, bypassing Russian and European middlemen.
about.why2Desc: Before shipping, we photograph and film every order. You see your part before it leaves Korea.
about.why3Desc: We work exclusively with genuine OEM parts for Hyundai, Kia, and Genesis. No aftermarket, no counterfeits.
about.why4Desc: Direct supply from Korea removes extra links in the chain. You pay less than at local dealers.
about.locationDesc: Asan is South Korea's automotive capital. The main Hyundai Mobis factory is located here, supplying most of our parts. This gives us access to the full range of parts at factory prices.
about.guarantee2: Photo and video report before shipping
about.guarantee4: Manager support at every stage of your order

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, we only supply original OEM parts manufactured by Hyundai, Kia, and Genesis directly from Korea.
faq.a2: Delivery takes 7 to 14 business days depending on your country and chosen shipping method.
faq.a3: After submitting your request, our manager will contact you and offer convenient payment options. We accept bank transfers and popular payment systems.
faq.q4: How do I check a car's VIN?
faq.a4: Use our Telegram bot @caranalizer_bot — it will verify the history of any Korean car by VIN code for free.
faq.a5: We ship parts to most countries via EMS and other international delivery services.

footer.description: Korean auto parts online — 140,000+ genuine OEM parts for Hyundai, Kia, Genesis. Buy direct from Korea.
